phrases.intent_en: Where to rent the audio guide
phrases.text_local: Kde si můžu půjčit audio průvodce?
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are typically rented at the main ticket office ('pokladna') in Czech castles. 'Hned vedle' means right next to.

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, right next to the entrance.

responses.english: At the ticket office, right next to the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: How to reach the viewing gallery
phrases.text_local: Jak se dostanu na vyhlídkovou galerii?
phrases.cultural_note: Czech castle towers often have narrow spiral staircases ('točité schody'). 'Až nahoru' means all the way up.

likely_response.translation_en: Up the spiral staircase all the way to the top.

responses.english: Up the spiral staircase all the way to the top.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the tower-only ticket booth
phrases.text_local: Kde je pokladna jen na věž?
phrases.cultural_note: Czech ticket sellers often use 'tady' (here) and point, so listen for location words like 'u vchodu' (at the entrance).

likely_response.translation_en: Right here at the tower entrance.

responses.english: Right here at the tower entrance.
